About Me 👑

Why hire me for your next project?

I have worked with both prominent and smaller creators to help them build their personal brands on social media through content strategy and editing. I also managed my own channel, gaining over one million views in a year while remaining faceless.

Creative video editor and thumbnail designer with 2+ years of experience crafting eye-catching content. I specialize in editing YouTube videos and reels that keep viewers hooked. My thumbnails are designed to boost clicks and engagement.

What I Offer

My Services

🎬
Long Form Video Editing

YouTube videos, podcasts, and documentary-style content edited with precision. Color graded, sound mixed, and polished for maximum audience retention.

📱
Short Form Content

Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and TikToks designed to hook viewers in the first 3 seconds. Fast cuts, captions, and trending audio integration.

🖼️
Thumbnail Design

CTR-optimized thumbnails that stand out. Psychology-backed designs using color theory, contrast, and emotional triggers to drive more clicks.
